tips: /hauntmode burp api.target.com POST — pull filtered Burp history
/hauntmode requests.txt — batch analyze a file of requests
/recon — map attack surface from httpx-live.txt + Burp history
/recon app.target.com — focused recon on a single host
Leads land in reports/leads.md — check it after a session
Confirmed findings go to reports/findings.md automatically
Fill in headers.conf — Claude adds those headers to every request
Set RATE_LIMIT in headers.conf to stay within program rules
HauntMode triages batch requests before running full analysis
Already-analyzed requests are skipped automatically — no dupes
Ask Claude to pull Burp history directly — no copying needed
